allow: Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_a0472499a811799e70645fe6b0bcec6ed6ec3790 npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT id, user_id, owner_id, org_id, score FROM public.trainers;")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_a0472499a811799e70645fe6b0bcec6ed6ec3790 npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as calls_total, COUNT\(org_id\) as calls_with_org FROM public.calls;")
